zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Darcy於大約1425年出生在英國素福爾可斯托馬可特時，她的父親Robert Darcy35歲，母親Lady Alice Fitzlangley32歲。她於大約1444年與Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年在英國哈普爾賀隆享年101歲。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Darcy was born about 1425, in Stowmarket, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert Darcy, was 35 and her mother, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, was 32. She married Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping about 1444, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1525, in Heron, Hampshire, England, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Darcy est née environ 1425, à Stowmarket, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Darcy, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping environ 1444, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Heron, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 101 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Darcyが約1425年にイギリススフォルクストウマーケトで生まれた時，父Robert Darcyは35歳，母Lady Alice Fitzlangleyは32歳であった。約1444年にイギリスでSir William Tyrrell of Gippingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年にイギリスハンプシュアイアハーオンで101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Darcy(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 수폴크 스타우마크트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Darcy(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Fitzlangley(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1444년 영국에서 Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 함프실르 허에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping aproximadamente 1444, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1525, em Heron, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Darcy родилась около 1425 г. в местности стоумаркет, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Darcy было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Fitzlangley, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping около 1444 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1525 г. в местности хирон, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 101 год.
